description: Drop-in RMCP runtime for provider-backed MCP tools, prompts, resources, and agent capabilities.
name: ai.dinglebear/soma-rmcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path to the installed soma binary. When unset, the npm launcher runs soma from PATH.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_BIN

environmentVariables.description: Runtime data directory for local stdio/CLI runs.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_HOME

environmentVariables.description: Directory scanned for drop-in provider manifests and modules.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_PROVIDER_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional deployed platform API or upstream API base URL used by the SomaClient compatibility layer. Leave unset for local provider/runtime mode.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token or upstream API key for provider-backed calls that use SomaClient. Keep secret.
environmentVariables.name: SOMA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Rust tracing filter for local CLI and stdio MCP logs.
environmentVariables.name: RUST_LOG

title: Soma
